REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (28 & 30 Sonoma Street & 1327 & 1329 Kearney Street, San Francisco, Ca)
Off Calendar Nov-06-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Eric Dzubur for Petitioner.

The Estate holds a 50% interest in the properties. However, 100% of properties were sold. The sale was confirmed at $1,360,250.00 to San Francisco Affordable Housing and Jeffrey Mak based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale filed July 31, 2012. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to review of the order). Bond is waived. A Cashiers Check was presented in open Court.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy M. Benton.

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (28 & 30 Sonoma Street & 1327 & 1329 Kearney Street, San Francisco, Ca)
Off Calendar Sep-26-2012 Continued To Oct-24-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Eric Dzubur for Petitioner.

The Court informed Counsel that the sale was not published, that they need to give notice to the Buyers as well as those Individuals who requested special notice and that they need a
re-appraisal. The Report of Sale and Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property was continued to October 24, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for Counsel to clear up the various problems as indicated in the Probate Examiner's notes.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Santiago.
